name: rvv-scalar-dispatch-plugin-owned-exporter-bundle
title: RVV+scalar dispatch artifact routes through plugin-owned exporter registration
description: RVV+scalar dispatch artifact routes through plugin-owned exporter registration
creator: codex
notes: Implemented plugin-owned target artifact exporter bundle registration for RVV+scalar dispatch source/header/object composite routes. Dispatch routes now come from the scalar-plugin exporter bundle with rvv-plugin as a required enabled dependency, while target-owned RVVScalarDispatch code preserves dispatch case/fallback component validation, ABI parameter roles, component groups, and source/header/object export semantics. Built-in central non-plugin registration no longer publishes the dispatch route group. Focused C++ coverage, i32-vmul bundle lit coverage, git diff --check, and check-tianchenrv passed. No RVV runtime/correctness/performance claim was made.
